backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend canister placeholder with no implemented methods.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing four implemented features (remove technician signature, multi-photo upload, per-photo labels, rename HELPER to ASSIS TECHNICIAN) with associated files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line summaries of each frontend source file describing their purpose and key implementation details.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS base file defining OKLCH color token variables for both light and dark themes using CSS custom properties.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point that loads Inter and Oswald fonts from Google Fonts and jsPDF 2.5.1 via CDN, then mounts the React app at #root.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component rendering a sticky header with the Security Engineering Inc. branding, a hero banner with feature icons, the ReportForm, and a footer with caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/ReportForm.tsx: Daily field report form component supporting multi-photo upload with per-photo label inputs, punch in/out time tracking, and PDF generation via pdfGenerator; uses 'Assis Technician' label and has no technician signature field.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, recreating it when the Internet Identity changes and invalidating dependent queries accordingly.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status derived from the DFINITY AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Placeholder module confirming no backend queries are needed since the app operates entirely client-side.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines a dark industrial theme with CSS custom properties, including safety yellow and high-vis orange accents, plus reusable button and signature component classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the root component wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts: Utility module that generates a styled dark-themed PDF daily field report using jsPDF, including helper functions for drawing page backgrounds, headers, footers, and support for photo data with labels.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration that maps CSS custom properties to theme tokens (colors, fonts, radii, shadows, animations) and registers the animate, typography, and container-queries plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file tracking existing features and pending feature requests for the SECENG Daily Report app, including removal of the technician signature field, multi-photo upload, per-photo labels, and renaming 'HELPER' to 'ASSIS TECHNICIAN'.
